hooks.command: node -e "const i=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8'));const p=(i.tool_input&&(i.tool_input.file_path||i.tool_input.path))||'';const blocked=[/(^|[\\\\\/])\.env\.production$/i,/k8s[\\\\\/].*secrets?\.ya?ml$/i,/\.pem$/i,/k8s[\\\\\/].+[\\\\\/]deployment\.ya?ml$/i];const hit=blocked.find(r=>r.test(p));if(hit){console.error('Refusing to write to '+p+' (matches '+hit+'). Production secrets and CI-managed K8s deployment manifests must not be edited by Claude. Image tags in k8s/*/deployment.yaml are rewritten by .github/workflows/deploy.yml on every push to main.');process.exit(2)}"

node -e "const i=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8'));const c=(i.tool_input&&i.tool_input.command)||'';if(/git\s+commit\b/.test(c)&&/(\.env(\s|$|\.)|Kribaat\.pem|k8s\/secrets\.yaml)/.test(c)){console.error('Blocked: commit appears to include a secret file (.env / *.pem / k8s/secrets.yaml). These are gitignored — do not force-add them.');process.exit(2)}if(/git\s+add\s+(-A|-a|--all|\.)/.test(c)){console.error('Avoid \"git add -A/.\" in this repo — it can sweep in local debug scripts (check_*.py, *.ps1, agent.md) that are gitignored only by pattern. Stage files explicitly by name.');process.exit(2)}"

node -e "console.log('Repo notes: production deploys via GitHub Actions → ArgoCD (do not edit k8s/*/deployment.yaml image tags or run redeploy.ps1). Frontend type-check is npm run build:check (npm run build skips tsc). Product scope is locked by agent.md — no POS/CRM/payments/delivery features.')"
